summary: Iteration 28 — Regression testing after (1) backend server.py modular refactor into core/{db,models,auth,services}.py, (2) AdminDashboard.jsx split into components/admin/* sub-components, (3) new LanguageSwitcher header component with FR/EN/ES. Backend: 19/19 pytest pass — all critical endpoints (auth, company, drivers, dashboard stats, deliveries, eco-scores, damage, notifications, audit-logs, SIRET verify, subscription, stripe payment-links, settings/preferences PATCH, change-password, forgot-password, refresh, logout) respond correctly post-refactor. Frontend: Language switcher present in header with globe + locale label, opens menu with FR/EN/ES options (all data-testid present), switching to EN persists to localStorage tp-locale='en' and survives reload. Translations work on Overview ('Overview', 'Money locked (trucks)'), Drivers tab ('Add a driver', 'Total drivers'), Eco-scores tab, Subscription page ('My Subscription', 'Choose this plan', 'Current plan : GROWTH', 'Active'), Settings page ('Settings', 'My profile', 'Services & Billing', 'Manage billing'). NewDeliveryForm modal opens with EN labels (Recipient name, Address, Phone, Package description, Weight). Stripe shows Current plan : GROWTH Active correctly. NO regression on backend or major UI flows.

issues: Partial i18n coverage — several hardcoded French strings remain when locale=en: 'NOM' (should be 'NAME'), 'STATUT' (should be 'STATUS'), 'Actif' (should be 'Active'), 'DATE D'INSCRIPTION', 'RAISON SOCIALE', 'TVA INTRA', 'ADRESSE DU SIÈGE', 'Logo entreprise (sidebar + futurs e-CMR PDF)', 'Choisir un logo', 'PNG / JPEG / WEBP / SVG · max 500 KB', 'Préférences de notification', 'Email envoyé'. The 4 spec-required strings (Settings / My profile / Services & Billing / Manage billing) ARE translated correctly so spec passes, but residual FR labels look inconsistent in EN UI.

Backend: GET /api/notifications (PASS)

Backend: GET /api/subscription/plans (PASS)
Backend: GET /api/stripe/payment-links (PASS)

Backend: POST /api/auth/change-password with valid current pwd succeeds + rollback (PASS)

Frontend: Login as azer@gmail.com lands on /dashboard (PASS)
Frontend: lang-switcher-btn visible in header with globe + locale label (PASS)
Frontend: Clicking switcher opens menu with lang-option-fr / -en / -es (PASS)
Frontend: Clicking EN switches dashboard text to English ('Overview', 'Money locked (trucks)', 'Generate e-CMR') (PASS)
Frontend: localStorage.tp-locale='en' after switching (PASS)
Frontend: Page reload preserves EN locale (switcher still shows EN, body still English) (PASS)
Frontend: Drivers tab in EN shows 'Add a driver' and 'Total drivers' (PASS)
Frontend: Eco-scores tab in EN renders with translations (extracted EcoScoresTab component) (PASS)
Frontend: Subscription page (sidebar) in EN shows 'My Subscription', 'Choose this plan', 'Current plan : GROWTH', 'Active', plan tiers (PASS)
Frontend: Settings page (sidebar) in EN shows 'Settings', 'My profile', 'Services & Billing', 'Manage billing' (PASS — spec strings)
Frontend: Add Driver modal opens via data-testid=add-driver-btn (extracted NewDriverForm) (PASS)
Frontend: New Delivery modal opens via data-testid=new-delivery-btn on Deliveries tab (extracted NewDeliveryForm) with EN labels Recipient name/Address/Phone/Package description/Weight (PASS)
Frontend: Stripe Current plan = GROWTH (CROISSANCE) Active badge visible (PASS)
action_items: MINOR i18n polish: Translate residual French strings on Settings page when locale=en — 'NOM' → 'NAME', 'STATUT' → 'STATUS', 'Actif' → 'Active', 'DATE D'INSCRIPTION' → 'REGISTRATION DATE', 'RAISON SOCIALE', 'TVA INTRA', 'ADRESSE DU SIÈGE' (these are French legal/admin terms, decide if they should be left as-is for FR business context or translated), 'Logo entreprise (sidebar + futurs e-CMR PDF)', 'Choisir un logo', 'Préférences de notification', 'Email envoyé'. Add corresponding keys to /app/frontend/src/i18n/{en,es}.json and replace hardcoded JSX text with t() calls in SettingsPage component.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactor is clean — server.py imports from core/ work correctly; no circular imports detected; all 16 critical endpoints regression-tested green.

LanguageSwitcher component correctly stores manual override in localStorage and respects navigator.language autodetect on first visit (test browser detected 'en' → showed EN as default, which matches /app/frontend/src/i18n/index.jsx auto-detect spec).

AdminDashboard refactor (1067 lines from 1869) — extracted DashboardForms (NewDeliveryForm, NewDriverForm), DashboardHelpers (StatCard, GatedButton, LockedFeatureOverlay), DamageReportCard, EcoScoresTab — all render correctly when triggered by their data-testid buttons. No regression on tab switching, modal open/close, or chart rendering.
Iteration 27 critical bug (login response missing subscription_status) appears resolved — admin login flow works without gate redirect (azer@gmail.com lands directly on dashboard).
Settings page has incomplete i18n — about 8-10 hardcoded French strings remain. Not a regression (likely pre-existing), but worth fixing for full EN/ES experience.

success_rate.frontend: 95% — all spec-required flows pass; minor residual FR strings on Settings page in EN locale

seed_data_creation: None — read-only regression tests; change-password test rolls back to original password.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend modular refactor is verified clean — /app/backend/tests/test_iteration28.py is the regression suite, run it after any future changes to core/* or server.py. Frontend i18n switcher and refactored AdminDashboard sub-components all work. Only residual finding is partial FR strings on SettingsPage when locale=en (NOM/STATUT/Actif/etc) — main agent should add ~10 i18n keys and replace hardcoded JSX. Sidebar navigation to Subscription/Settings keeps URL as /dashboard (these are tabs, not separate routes), so test by clicking the sidebar items not URL navigation.
